summary: Session-truth provenance (template id + resolved RTH window/tz) is correctly part of the content-addressed identity for session-conditioned OHLCV contracts (reset_on_session=True extension in family.py; vwap pack names already covered at base via P194500). Mutation-verified rotation, reviewer-verified zero churn for unconditioned fvids across base vs diff, real temp-registry supersession proof, fast-pack guard parity-locks pack specs to the live session truth. CLI test edits are order-isolation only; labels src untouched; all validation counts reproduced exactly (135 / 262 / 2861+1skip+3 known env fails / smoke PASS / 21 canaries PASS).

findings.title: Fast-pack session guard has no direct negative test
findings.detail: Deleting the _validate_session_contract_parameters call in vwap_session_auction.py survives the entire selected suite (mutation M3: 446 + 187 tests green). Guard is defense-in-depth only today; add a negative test feeding the pack a provenance-stripped spec and asserting PackMaterializerError.

findings.title: Over-rotation invariant not pinned to a literal fvid
findings.detail: No-churn is asserted via monkeypatched template comparison within the new code; reviewer independently confirmed unconditioned fvids are bit-identical base vs diff (fver_643e91dc... and fver_720a55e3... unchanged). A pinned literal fvid for one unconditioned contract would make the invariant durable against future churn.

findings.title: Spec scope item 2 verification not recorded in handoff
findings.detail: The session pack (families/session, fast/session_calendar_roll) was correctly left alone, but the handoff does not record that the consistency check was performed.

findings.title: Supersession bookkeeping spans two merges
findings.detail: vwap-pack fvids rotated at the P194500 merge (base), not this diff; this diff rotates reset_on_session=True OHLCV fvids. Coordinator deprecation must cover both stale-id sets.

mutation_test_results.mutation: family.py: revert _requires_session_truth_parameters to name-in-_SESSION_TRUTH_FEATURES only (strip reset_on_session rotation)

mutation_test_results.observed: 6 FAILED: identity tests [returns]+[vwap] plus all 4 test_vwap_session_auction_pack.py tests (pack guard rejected mismatching provenance)
all tests pass (tests/unit/features + feature_compute_fast_path 187 passed; -k identity/version/vwap/ohlcv/session/fast/pack 446 passed)
mutation_test_results.disposition: warning W1 (recommended follow-up test, not blocking)

vwap_reset_on_session_true.note: already rotated at base by P194500 (#369)
